overall.description: First-person exploration of a Victorian house exterior and garden in a narrative video game. The player walks along the side of a blue wooden house, through a gate, and explores a wooden deck with outdoor furniture before entering a gazebo overlooking a lush garden under stormy skies.

agents.ego_description: walking along the house wall toward the side garden gate

entered.detail: two-story blue wooden house with white trim and decorative balcony
white and gray striped canvas awnings over windows
black metal gate with stone pillars marking garden entrance
wet stone pavement leading alongside the house

segments.scene_description: Moving along the side of a blue Victorian house with striped awnings, approaching and passing through an iron gate into a narrow garden passage. The sky is overcast with dark storm clouds visible overhead.

segments.scene_description: Moving through the gate along a stone path, the scene opens to a garden deck with blooming trees and outdoor furniture as the house recedes behind to the left.

segments.scene_description: Exploring the spacious wooden deck with multiple dining tables, folding chairs, and a barbecue grill surrounded by flowering trees under dark storm clouds.

well-maintained green grass sloping upward beyond the wall

segments.scene_description: Entering a blue wooden gazebo with a round table, looking out at a lush garden with stone walls, lawn, and vibrant red flowering plants in the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the narrow side of a Victorian residence into an expansive, storm-shadowed garden. It begins by gliding along the blue wooden walls of the house beneath striped awnings, passing through an iron gate into a confined stone passage under a heavy, overcast sky. As the camera moves forward, the space opens up into a wide wooden deck where the house recedes to the left, revealing blooming trees and various outdoor furniture. The scene then expands across the deck, passing dining tables and a barbecue grill, before turning toward a blue wooden gazebo. Finally, the camera enters the gazebo to look out over a lush landscape of stone walls, green lawns, and vibrant red flowering plants.
